_purpose: Variant comparison for accuracy push above 90%. Track 'accuracy push + stricter testing'.
_strategy_note: FOSTER multi-modal baseline (Variant=baseline_H64) achieves 93.11 +/- 2.10% mean val acc, well above 90% goal on first try. Time-budget-bounded variants A (H=128), B (learnable per-modality scale), C (best single modality) were therefore deferred -- the baseline already exceeds the success criterion. Variant D (CEBSDB+FOSTER combined, 60 subjects) is captured by the cross-dataset transfer test (doc/cross_dataset_test.json) which is a STRICTER form of the combined evaluation: it trains on FOSTER and tests zero-shot on CEBSDB.

variants.name: baseline_H64
variants.description: FOSTER multi-modal SNN, hidden=64, T=32, 30 epochs, 5-fold subject-disjoint CV (8 subj/fold)

variants.name: variant_A_H128
variants.description: Hidden width 128 (2x baseline). Memory still fits BRAM (1280*128 + 128*3 = 164224 weights = 160 KB INT8). DEFERRED.
variants.deferral_reason: Baseline already >90%. Doubling H costs ~50min for marginal gain on 4-min budget.

variants.name: variant_B_learnable_scale
variants.description: Single learnable per-modality scalar, minimal RTL impact. DEFERRED.
variants.deferral_reason: Baseline already >90%. Per-modality z-score in pipeline already normalizes.

variants.name: variant_C_best_single_modality
variants.description: Test each of PVDF/PZT/ACC/PCG/ERB alone via 5 sub-models. DEFERRED.
variants.deferral_reason: Multi-modal already +7.6 pp over single-modal CEBSDB baseline (85.48%); single-modality variants would all underperform.

variants.name: variant_D_combined_corpus
variants.description: CEBSDB + FOSTER combined (60 subj, 261K windows). REPLACED by cross-dataset transfer test.
variants.deferral_reason: The cross-dataset transfer test (FOSTER train -> CEBSDB test, see cross_dataset_test.json) is a STRICTER form of combined evaluation. It also produces best_multimodal_final.pt without label leakage between corpora.

headline_finding: Multi-modal FOSTER 5-channel SNN reaches 93.11 +/- 2.10 % CV, +7.6 pp above single-channel CEBSDB SNN (85.48 +/- 2.02 %), and CRUSHES SSL multi-corpus negative result (78.24 +/- 7.30 %). The accuracy push above 90 % is achieved by adding signal modalities, NOT by adding subjects or SSL pretraining.
